meaning: n.发痒,渴望,[医]疥疮(尤指发痒的)vi.发痒,渴望
examples: She has an itch to travel.
Scratch my back – I've got an itch.
When someone has hay fever, the eyes and nose will stream and itch.
Broadcaster Simon Mayo has been nominated for a prestigious literary award for his first novel, Itch.
When excess money is created, lenders and investors feel the itch to put it to work.
